creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Mon, Aug 20, 2001 at 09:37:31AM -0700, Daryl Spartz wrote:
> 
> >Number:         29904
> >Category:       gnu
> >Synopsis:       make world failure, 4.3.0 release
> 
...
> Writing Makefile for DynaLoader
> 
> Warning: /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/lib/Config.pm may be out of date with /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/config.sh
> 
...
> Warning: /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/config.h out of date with /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/config.sh
...
> Makefile out-of-date with respect to /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/lib/Config.pm /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/config.h
...

Chances are your system's clock is off by a few days/months/years...

-- 
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
